title: hieracium pilosella subsp. athesinum
intro: Hieracium pilosella subsp. athesinum, also known as Athesin Hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, belonging to the dandelion family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of wounds, skin irritations, and inflammatory conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Athesin Hawkweed include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to help soothe and calm irritated skin. Athesin Hawkweed can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
